description: in kanban view there should be a + add new project at end of project list and also there should be a trash icon to quickly delete, but it should do a modal confirmation asking you type project name and give you option to soft delete(remove from projects). It should have the project name up and copy-able by highlighting and hitting control c, but do not make it copy clickable.
title: Add kanban quick actions: create and delete projects

descriptionHistory.description: in kanban view there should be a + add new project at end of project list and also there should be a trash icon to quickly delete, but it should do a modal confirmation asking you type project name and give you option to soft delete(remove from projects). It should have the project name up and copy-able by highlighting and hitting control c, but do not make it copy clickable.
